positive: A central, highly detailed stylized bioluminescent forest scene at twilight. Include glowing mushrooms, ethereal fauna silhouettes (like stylized fox spirits or glowing butterflies), and massive, ancient tree roots. The composition must be centered and symmetrical, featuring strong, deep navy and teal color tones contrasted sharply with electric cyan and lime green glowing light. Use a clean, graphic, maximalist illustration style with deep silhouettes and luminous elements that pop against a dark background. Vector art quality, high contrast, perfect for screen printing on apparel.
negative: photorealistic, photograph, low resolution, blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, dirty, smudges, messy, low contrast, bad anatomy, extra limbs, ugly, grain
